context: TypeScript Hono API project, git initialized, biome.json present. ~/.claude.json has no entries whose name starts with 'linear'.
expected_behavior: Step 3 reads ~/.claude.json and finds zero Linear servers, sets linearAvailable=false, and logs the hint about adding mcp-server-linear
Skips Step 4 entirely — does not call any mcp__linear-* tools, does not issue workspace/team/project AskUserQuestions
Continues to Step 5 stack detection and Step 7 write, omitting the integrations.linear section from the final .claude/bruhs.json
Final summary in Step 8 does not list a Linear integration line, and tells the user how to add Linear later
failure_modes: Attempts ToolSearch for mcp__linear__linear_get_teams even though no Linear server is configured
Writes integrations.linear with null/empty strings instead of omitting the whole section
Aborts the claim entirely because Linear is missing, even though Linear is optional per the command doc
